subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P2] Add isSystem column to agents schema
description:
Add the `isSystem` boolean column to the `agents` Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/mesh.ts`.

## Schema Change

In `packages/db/src/schema/mesh.ts`, add the `isSystem` column to the `agents` table:

```typescript
export const agents = sqliteTable('agents', {
  id: text('id').primaryKey(),
  name: text('name').notNull(),
  runtime: text('runtime').notNull(),
  projectPath: text('project_path').notNull().unique(),
  namespace: text('namespace').notNull().default('default'),
  capabilities: text('capabilities_json').notNull().default('[]'),
  entrypoint: text('entrypoint'),
  version: text('version'),
  description: text('description'),
  approver: text('approver'),
  status: text('status', {
    enum: ['active', 'inactive', 'unreachable'],
  })
    .notNull()
    .default('active'),
  scanRoot: text('scan_root').notNull().default(''),
  behaviorJson: text('behavior_json').notNull().default('{"responseMode":"always"}'),
  budgetJson: text('budget_json')
    .notNull()
    .default('{"maxHopsPerMessage":5,"maxCallsPerHour":100}'),
  isSystem: integer('is_system', { mode: 'boolean' }).notNull().default(false), // NEW
  lastSeenAt: text('last_seen_at'),
  lastSeenEvent: text('last_seen_event'),
  persona: text('persona'),
  personaEnabled: integer('persona_enabled', { mode: 'boolean' }).notNull().default(true),
  traitsJson: text('traits_json'),
  conventionsJson: text('conventions_json'),
  color: text('color'),
  icon: text('icon'),
  registeredAt: text('registered_at').notNull(),
  updatedAt: text('updated_at').notNull(),
});
```

## Update shared types

If there is an `AgentManifest` or similar type in `packages/shared/`, add `isSystem?: boolean` to it. The field defaults to `false` so it's optional on input but always present on output.

Search for the agent type definition (likely in `packages/shared/src/mesh-schemas.ts` or similar) and add the field.

## Update MeshCore

In `packages/mesh/`, update the `MeshCore` class and related types to handle the `isSystem` field:
- The `register()` / `registerByPath()` method should accept `isSystem` as an optional field
- The `get()` and `list()` methods should return `isSystem` in the agent data
- The `unregister()` method should check `isSystem` and throw if attempting to unregister a system agent

Update the agent-to-DB serialization and DB-to-agent deserialization to include `isSystem`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `agents` table has `is_system INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0`
- Existing agents are unaffected (default `false`)
- Agent types include `isSystem` field
- MeshCore handles `isSystem` in CRUD operations
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
activeForm: Adding isSystem column to agents schema
